  "findings": [
    "Shaft alignment was completed before final piping connection, violating proper sequencing and introducing unmeasured pipe strain."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the current alignment record.",
    "Loosen piping flanges to check for pipe strain.",
    "Re-align the shaft after final piping connections are made and verified to be strain-free."
  ],
  "rationale": "According to API 686, final shaft alignment must be verified after the final piping connections are made to ensure that pipe strain does not pull the equipment out of alignment. Performing alignment before final piping connection without a post-connection check is non-compliant.",
  "references": [
    "API 686 Chapter 6",
    "Laser alignment system manuals"
  ]
}
